# Curated reference set for PSMM unit/regression tests.
#
# Extracted verbatim from AllKnownParallel (Pavel Holoborodko, Advanpix).
# Format matches AllKnownParallel:
#
#   N M NNZ H L K U Q R c_0 c_1 ... c_{N/2}
#
# Selection:
#   - lowest-M polynomial at each even degree N in {10, 12, ..., 30}
#     (baseline correctness)
#   - several near-threshold polynomials (M in [1.29, 1.30]) at mixed
#     degrees (critical for A1 regression: none may be falsely rejected
#     when threshold T = 1.3)
#
# Regeneration: tests/gen-reference.sh (if ever needed).

# --- Lowest-M baseline per degree ---
 10 1.176280818259917506544070338474035050693415806564695259830106347029688377 4 1 9 1 8 0 2 1 1 0 -1 -1 -1
